zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Dacre於1387年10月27日出生在英國波藍德納沃斯時，他的父親William Dacre29歲，母親Joan Douglas28歲。他於1399年7月20日之前與Philippa Neville在英國英格蘭波藍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年1月5日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Dacre于1387年10月27日出生在英国波藍德納沃斯时，他的父亲William Dacre29岁，母亲Joan Douglas28岁。他于1399年7月20日之前与Philippa Neville在英国英格兰波藍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年1月5日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Dacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Dacre, one in Cumbria, the other in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Dacre was born on 27 October 1387, in Naworth, Cumberland, England, his father, William Dacre, was 29 and his mother, Joan Douglas, was 28. He married Philippa Neville before 20 July 1399, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 January 1458, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Dacre est né le 27 octobre 1387, à Naworth, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Dacre, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Douglas, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Neville avant 20 juillet 1399, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 janvier 1458, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Dacre am 27. Oktober 1387 in Naworth, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Dacre 29 und seine Mutter Joan Douglas 28. Er hat vor 20. Juli 1399 in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Philippa Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Januar 1458 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dacre è nato il il 27 ottobre 1387 nel Naworth, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, William Dacre, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan Douglas, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Neville prima del 20 luglio 1399, nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 gennaio 1458, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dacreが1387年10月27日にイギリスクウンバーランドナウオルスで生まれた時，父William Dacreは29歳，母Joan Douglasは28歳であった。1399年7月20日以前にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドでPhilippa Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年1月5日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dacre(이)가 1387년 10월 27일 영국 쿠벌랜드 나워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Dacre(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Douglas(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1399년 7월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드에서 Philippa Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 1월 5일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 쿠벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.27 October 1387–5 January 1458: 27 de outubro de 1387–5 de janeiro de 1458
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dacre nasceu em 27 de outubro de 1387, em Naworth, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Dacre, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan Douglas, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Neville antes 20 de julho de 1399, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1458, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Dacre родился 27 октября 1387 г. в местности наворт, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William Dacre было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Douglas, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Neville перед 20 июля 1399 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 января 1458 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности кумбирланд, Англия.

es.27 October 1387–5 January 1458: 27 de octubre de 1387–5 de enero de 1458
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Dacre nació el 27 de octubre de 1387, en Naworth, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Dacre, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan Douglas, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Philippa Neville antes de 20 de julio de 1399, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de enero de 1458, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Cumberland, Inglaterra.
